channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: The Rev. Jesse Jackson, who led the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King, has died at 84
item.description: The Rev. Jesse L. Jackson has died. He was 84. Jackson was a protege of the Rev. Martin Luther King and became a leader of the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King was assassinated in 1968.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie kidnapping investigators work with Walmart after identifying suspect’s backpack
Shooting at Rhode Island youth hockey game leaves 3 dead, including shooter, and 3 more wounded
